• China Leading Manufacturer

Shanghai Npack Automation Equipment Co , ltd

One Stop Packaging Solution for liquid bottling;Turnkey projects for Daily Chemicals, Cosmetics,Food Sauce and Oils industries. Leaders in Manufacturing Liquid Filler and capper since 2015. OEM/ODM and Partners are welcome

Products
Solutions

About Us

Shanghai Npack Automation Equipment Co., ltd established in 2012,it is a reputable china leading manufacturer focus on customized designing, manufacturing and service of liquid bottling equipments. Npack main equipments include top-of-the-line equipments, such as liquid fillers, bottle cappers, labeling applicators, bottle rinsers, unscramblers, sorters, and conveyor systems. We pride ourselves on delivering high-quality packaging machineries that meet industry standards and fulfill the specific needs of our clients. With our extensive expertise and commitment to excellence, we strive to provide reliable and efficient equipments for all of our clients and partners.

Learn More

SGS Verified Company

Alibaba 13+ years Verified Member

Made-In-China Audited Supplier

Direct Industry Verified Member

Our Products

Whether you’re in the food, sauce and beverage, pharmaceutical and drugs, cosmetics, chemicals, or any other industry that involves liquid bottle or container filling, the right equipment is essential for efficiency, accuracy, and maintaining product integrity. Npack is professional in designing and manufacturing liquid bottling machines and plants that fulfill your needs. We also offer turnkey bottling projects, starting from layout design to full packaging lines

Liquid Filling Machines

Npack designs and manufactures an extensive range of liquid,sauce,powder and granular filling machines which adapt with a variety of advance technologies and features, offering both fully automated and semi-automated.
Details

Capping Machines

Npack produces a range of bottle capping machines that operate in both intermittent and continuous modes, available in both inline and rotary setups. The smart servo system ensure the capping efficent and perfect sealing.
Details

Labeling Machines

Here, you can find a wide variety of labeling applicators, encompassing options for stickers, OPP labels, hot glue, wet glue, as well as instant printing and labeling solutions. Contact our team for your labeling solution.
Details
Learn More

Our Bottling Solutions

Shanghai Npack provides comprehensive packaging solutions for liquid, sauce, granular, and powder bottling. Our integrated process begins with bottle manufacturing, molding, and injection, and concludes with product storage and tracking systems. This all-encompassing approach incorporates a variety of bottling equipment. These machines form complete packaging lines, which include a series of units such as bottle unscramblers, rinsing machines, fillers, cappers, labeling applicators, and other auxiliary equipment.

Oil Bottling

Daily Chemical Bottling

Sauce Bottling

Cosmetics Liquid Bottling

Wine and Liquor Bottling

Customized Liquid Bottling

Why Choose Us?

Npack Factory

A factory space of over 2,600 square meters, located at No. 2009, Xupan Road, Jiading District, Shanghai, China.

Npack Team

With more than 15 years of development, our team has grown and become more professional.

Npack Certification

Foreign Trade Registration Form, Customs Registration Certificate, Entry-Exit Inspection and Quarantine, CE, SGS, ROHS.

Npack Customer

70% of our equipment has been sold to Europe, the USA, and Australia. We have exported to over 100 countries, serving more than 1,000 users.

What Clients Comment

We cooperate with renowned brands both domestically and internationally, ensuring the high and stable performance of our equipment. We accept customization on key components, including motors, air cylinders, PLCs, gears, and HMIs. Come and see what our customers have to say about us.

The Liquid Bottling machines from Npack revolutionized our packaging operations, offering unmatched quality and efficiency. Strongly recommended!
